candidates.note: Candidate only. Final implementation should use actual SRM portal evidence from recording.

candidates.label: Settlement Number
candidates.note: Prefer business label over generated DOM id. Do not hard-code real settlement ids.

candidates.label: Query
candidates.note: Query completion must be verified by result evidence, not by click completion.
The row selector must be paired with current status and business context evidence.

candidates.label: Confirm Settlement
candidates.note: Opening confirmation is not enough; final submit must stay approval-gated.

candidates.label: Address
candidates.note: Optional dialog from old flow. Treat as auto-exempt until real recording proves exact behavior.

candidates.label: Submit
candidates.note: Final irreversible submit must be behind a human approval gate.
